integer.name: invoicingTypeLogTimesSelect
integer.title: Invoicing Type for Log Times
integer.help: This option allows choosing whether timesheets will be invoiced based on the activity used on timesheet lines, or based on the default activity defined on the employee form. On the employee form, this activity can be defined in the Timesheets tab, in the Product for time spent field.

boolean.name: consolidateTSLine
boolean.title: Consolidate timesheet line on invoice
boolean.help: This option consolidates timesheet lines by activity on invoices, meaning it merges multiple timesheet lines with the same activity into a single invoice line.

integer.name: defaultEndFormat
integer.title: Timesheet default end date format
integer.help: Allows defining whether by default the end date of a timesheet will automatically be at the end of the week, end of the month, or simply free allowing to freely choose the end date of a timesheet.

boolean.name: enableTimer
boolean.title: Start&Stop
boolean.help: This option provides the ability to use a built-in timer on timesheets to track exactly the time spent on an activity.

boolean.name: isMultipleTimerEnabled
boolean.title: Enable multiple timer
boolean.help: Enabling this option allows creating multiple timers simultaneously. If unchecked, the user can only use one timer at a time.

boolean.name: editModeTSTimer
boolean.title: Edit Start&Stop Timer On Stop
boolean.help: When this option is not enabled, once the timer is stopped, the created timesheet line is read-only. If you enable this option, you can edit the line to modify it.

boolean.name: keepProject
boolean.title: Keep Project for Start&Stop Timer
boolean.help: When this option is enabled, the project that was used during the last timer use is automatically reused when you start the timer again.

boolean.name: createLinesForLeaves
boolean.title: Create lines for day leaves
boolean.help: By enabling this option, when an employee leave request is validated, timesheet lines mentioning the leave are automatically added to the user timesheet for the relevant period.

boolean.name: createLinesForHolidays
boolean.title: Create lines for public holidays
boolean.help: By enabling this option, timesheet lines mentioning public holidays are automatically added to the user timesheet for the relevant period. This depends on the user public holiday planning.

boolean.name: timesheetEditor
boolean.title: Timesheet editor
boolean.help: This option enables a graphical editor on timesheets that allows entering time directly on a planning view.

boolean.name: displayTimesheetLineNumber
boolean.title: Display timesheet line number
boolean.help: This option allows numbering timesheet lines.

many-to-one.name: timesheetReminderTemplate
many-to-one.title: Timesheet reminder template
many-to-one.help: This is the email template that will be sent to employees when a reminder about their timesheets is sent to them.

boolean.name: isAlertManufOrderFinish
boolean.title: Alert if the manuf. order is finish
boolean.help: Alerts the user if they want to log time on a finished manufacturing order.

boolean.name: displayTaskColumnInPrinting
boolean.title: Display task column in printing
boolean.help: On timesheet printing, adds a task column showing the tasks of each timesheet line.

boolean.name: displayActivityColumnInPrinting
boolean.title: Display activity column in printing
boolean.help: On timesheet printing, adds an activity column showing the activities of each timesheet line.

boolean.name: needValidation
boolean.title: Need validation
boolean.help: By enabling this configuration, timesheets will be subject to a validation workflow by a manager. If unchecked, the user can confirm their own timesheets without validation from another person.

boolean.name: enableActivity
boolean.title: Enable activity
boolean.help: Allow to associate a product to the timesheet line (pre-requisite: only for product type that are services and Activity field is TRUE). Additional configuration can also be found in Application config --> Users/companies --> Companies --> Human resources config.

integer.name: dailyLimit
integer.title: Daily limit
integer.help: This configuration allows defining a daily hour limit for timesheets. Leave at 0 if you do not want to define a limit.

field.name: enableActivity
field.help: This configuration enables the ability to select an activity on timesheet lines. Activities are service-type products with the Activity checkbox checked. An employee can then select an activity when entering time, which can be taken into account when re-invoicing time spent to a client and/or in project costs as time spent.
